evals.prompt: Review my changes on the jwt-migration branch
evals.expected_outcome: Claude does an in-context pass (Step 1), invokes /codex:review for fresh eyes (Step 2), invokes /agy:longctx for orthogonal regression scan (Step 3), synthesizes a Block/Consider/Nit report with Consensus + Unique sections.

assertions.name: three_passes
assertions.description: all three: in-context (Claude), codex:review, and agy:longctx are exercised

assertions.name: synthesis_structure
assertions.description: review artifact includes Block/Consider/Nit + Consensus + Unique sections

assertions.name: false_positives_section
assertions.description: review includes a False positives section noting verified non-bugs

evals.prompt: Review my one-line typo fix to README.md
evals.expected_outcome: Claude does the in-context pass + codex:review for fresh eyes but SKIPS agy:longctx (diff is trivially local). Notes the skipped step in the report.

assertions.name: no_agy_longctx
assertions.description: agy:longctx is NOT invoked for a trivial 1-file diff

assertions.name: skip_disclosed
assertions.description: report explicitly notes the long-context scan was skipped as not warranted
